findings.note: All 12 stock clips downloaded from Pexels with first-query hits. 3 returned at 640x360 originally; re-fetched with broader queries to land all clips at 1280x720 minimum, most at 1920x1080+.
Music came from pixabay_music search (free) on first query. No music_gen fallback needed; saved $0.10.
ElevenLabs narration (voice George) ran in a single pass for $0.10. Actual delivered duration 85.7s vs 60s estimated (Attenborough cadence ~107 WPM real vs 155 WPM estimated).
Final video duration is ~87s instead of target 60s. Surfaced to user. Accepted as the right call to preserve voice register (versus rushing delivery or cutting script).
Subtitles (.srt) generated from script timestamps. Not burned-in for v1; .srt available for re-add if accessibility burn is required.
Total spend $0.10 vs proposal estimate $0.20. Half of estimated budget.
